screenshots.label: Hero: full canvas, all entities visible
screenshots.narration: This is StickerNest. An infinite canvas where widgets, stickers, and data all live together.

screenshots.label: Widget row: Todo, Kanban, Pathfinder
screenshots.annotation: Widgets are interactive apps — drop them anywhere on the canvas
screenshots.narration: Widgets are fully interactive apps living right on your canvas.

screenshots.label: Full canvas fit — all entities in frame
screenshots.annotation: Everything lives together — text, shapes, widgets, and stickers

screenshots.label: Entity selected — handles visible
screenshots.annotation: Click any entity to select, resize, move, or configure it
screenshots.narration: Click any entity to select it. Handles appear for resize, move, and config.

screenshots.label: Entity repositioned
screenshots.annotation: Drag anything, anywhere — the canvas is your layout engine

screenshots.label: Hover the preview mode button
screenshots.annotation: Run — one click to switch into Preview mode
screenshots.narration: Hit Run to go live. The editing tools disappear — your canvas becomes a product.

screenshots.label: Preview mode — clean, interactive canvas
screenshots.annotation: Preview mode — editing chrome disappears, widgets go live
screenshots.narration: Preview mode. No toolbars, no handles. Just your canvas, live and shareable.

screenshots.label: Back in edit mode — final wide shot
screenshots.narration: StickerNest. Your infinite canvas. Build anything.

recordings.narration: Zoom in — everything on the canvas is infinitely zoomable.

recordings.label: Drag entity to a new position
recordings.narration: Drag to reposition — every entity is fully movable.

metadata.description: Full platform walkthrough video showing canvas editing, widgets, and preview mode.
